tool_input.command:
cat /home/tie303177/work/nabledge-dev/.claude/worktrees/395-add-md-section-links/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-database.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
# Find s21 section
for s in data.get('sections', []):
    if s['id'] in ['s21', 's22', 's16', 's12', 's13']:
        print(f'=== {s[\"id\"]} : {s.get(\"title\", \"\")} ===')
        print(s.get('content', '')[:2000])
        print()
"

tool_input.description: Read database sections s21 and s22
